title: Bihar Police BPSSC Sub Inspector SI Re Upload Photo / Signature
SSC CGL Recruitment 2026 – Online Apply for 12256 Posts
details:
Organization
Staff Selection Commission (SSC)
Name of Post
Group B and Group C posts
No of Posts
12256 posts
Qualification
Graduate
Age Limit
18 to 27 years, 20 to 30 years, 18 to 30 years and 18 to 30 years
Application Fee
Rs. 100/-
Start Date
21st May 2026
Last Date
25th June 2026
SSC CGL Recruitment 2026
Staff Selection Commission (SSC)
has released the official notification of
Combined Graduate Level (CGL) Examination 2026
for the recruitment of approximately
12256
Group B and Group C posts
in different Ministries/ Departments/ Organizations of Government of India and various Constitutional Bodies/ Statutory Bodies/ Tribunals, etc.
Interested and eligible candidates may
apply online
here.
SSC CGL Recruitment Details
Name of examination: Combined Graduate Level Examination, 2026
Name of posts:
Various Group B and Group C Posts (Assistant Audit Officer, Assistant Accounts Officer, Assistant Section Officer, Inspector, Sub Inspector, Inspector of Posts, Statistical Investigator, Office Superintendent, Auditor , Accountant, Tax Assistant , Postal Assistant/ Sorting Assistant, etc  )
No of posts:
12,256 posts (approximately)
Pay Scale:
Pay Level 4 to Pay Level 8 (Pay Scale of ₹ 25500 to 81100 till ₹ 47600 to 151100, as per level of posts)
Helpline No:
1800 309 3063 (Toll Free)
Related Article:
SSC CHSL Recruitment
Eligibility Criteria of SSC CGL Recruitment
Age Limit:
There are four categories of age ranges: 18 to 27 years, 20 to 30 years, 18 to 30 years and 18 to 30 years.
Age Relaxation:
Category-wise age relaxation is as mentioned below
# SC/ST: 5 years
# OBC: 3 years
# PwD (Unreserved): 10 years
# PwD (OBC): 13 years
# PwD (SC/ST): 15 years
Educational Qualification:
Junior Statistical Officer
:
Bachelor’s Degree in any subject from a recognized University or Institute with at least 60% Marks in Mathematics at 12th standard level;
Or
Bachelor’s Degree in any subject with Statistics as one of the subjects at degree level.
Statistical Investigator Grade-II
:
Bachelor degree in Statistics or Mathematics or Economics or Demography or Population Studies or Operation Research or Information Technology or Computer Science or Computer Engineering or Computer Technology or Computer Application or Data Science or Artificial Intelligence from a recognized University or recognized Institute.
All Other Posts
:
Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized University or Institute.
## The candidates who have appeared in their final year of their graduation can also apply, however they must possess Essential qualification as on 01.08.2026.
Application Fee of SSC CGL Exam
# General/ OBC:
Rs. 100/-
# SC/ ST/ Women/Ex-Servicemen:
Nil
# Payment Mode:
Through Debit/ Credit Card/SBI Challan/SBI Net Banking
Exam Centres in North Eastern Region (NER)
Here is the list of examination centres in North Eastern Region states:
# Itanagar (5001)
# Dibrugarh (5102)
# Guwahati (Dispur) (5105)
# Jorhat (5107)
# Silchar (5111)
# Tezpur (5112)
# Dimapur (5301)
# Kohima (5302)
# Shillong (5401)
# Imphal (5501)
# Churachandpur (5502)
# Ukhrul (5503)
# Agartala (5601)
# Aizwal (5701)
How to Apply for SSC Recruitment ?
Interested and eligible candidates may
apply online
for these vacancy by visiting official
SSC Recruitment Portal.
Candidates may follow below mentioned steps to apply online.
# Scroll down, go to
Important Web-Links
section .
# Click on the "
Online Application
Form
" and complete the registration process.
# In the next stage, click on "
Online Application Form
" Link and Login.
# Fill your all
personal and educational details
and
upload
necessary documents.
# At the end,
pay the application fee
as per your category and
submit
the form.
# Don't forget to take a
print
out of the application form .
Important Dates of SSC CGL Recruitment 2026
Starting date of submission of online application:
21st May 2026
Last date of submission of online application:
22nd June 2026
Reopening of online application: 23rd June 2026 (23:00 hours) to 25th June 2026 (23:00 hours)

title: Municipal Corporation Group D Posts Online Form
details:
Vacancy Details for Bihar Police SI Recruitment 2023 : 

Important Information – According to the latest updates, Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission (BPSSC) has released the notification for the recruitment of Sub Inspector SI Posts on the official website of the Bihar Police BPSSC. As per the notification, Online application process for Bihar Police BPSSC Sub Inspector SI Recruitment 2023 will be start from 05 October 2023.

There is a total of 1,275 vacancies has been issued in the Bihar Police BPSSC Recruitment 2023 for the Sub Inspector SI Posts. Candidates must check the details for Bihar Police BPSSC Sub Inspector SI Recruitment 2023 which has given below.

Post Name – Sub Inspector, SI

Posts Wise Vacancy Details –

General – 441 Posts

EWS – 111 Posts

SC – 275 Posts

ST – 16 Posts

EBC – 238 Posts

BC – 107 Posts

BC-Female – 82 Posts

Pay Scale – As per rules

Educational Qualification for Bihar Police SI Recruitment 2023 –

Candidates who have Bachelor Degree in any stream from Any Recognized University in India will be eligible for this recruitment.

How to Apply for Bihar Police SI Recruitment 2023 – Candidates can apply through link provided below or they can also apply through official site of the CSBC before the 05 November 2023.

Mode of Selection for Bihar Police SI Recruitment 2023 – Selection will be based on-:

Written Examination &

PET, PST

Physical Standards Test for Bihar Police SI Recruitment 2023 – 

Height :

General / BC (Male) – 165 cms

Other (Male) – 160 cms

Female All Category – 155 cms

Chest:

General / BC (Male) – 81 – 86 cms

Other (Male) – 79 – 84 cms

Running :

Male – 1.6 km in 06 Minutes 30 Seconds.

Female – 1 km in 06 Minutes

High Jump :

Male – 04 Feet

Female – 03 Feet

Long Jump :

Male – 12 Feet

Female – 09 Feet

Gola Fek :

Male – 16 Pound – 16 Feet

title: KV Borjhar Recruitment –Apply For 15 Faculty and Other Posts
details:
KV Borjhar Recruitment 2026
PM SHRI KV AFS Borjhar, Guwahati has published a recruitment notification regarding recruitment of 15 PGT, TGT, Sports Coaches, Yoga Instructor, Computer Instructor, Nurse, Counsellor, Assamese Tr., Art & Craft Coach and Vocational Education Trainer Part-time Teachers on purely contractual basis. Interested candidates may check the detail notification. For more jobs and educational notifications please check Assam Job Alert Regularly.


KV Borjhar Recruitment Details
1. PGT

Educational Qualification: 

For Computer Science:

M.Sc. (Computer Science/IT)/MCA from recognized university with at least 50% marks. OR M.E. Or M.Tech. (Computer Science / IT) from recognized university / institution with at least 50% marks.
B.Ed. Degree from NCTE recognized institution/University with at least 50% marks. OR M.Ed from NCTE Three years integrated B.Ed. recognized Institution / University with at least 50% marks. OR Four years Integrated Degree with atleast 50% marks from NCTE recognized Institution / University including B.Ed. Component.
Desirable: Working knowledge of English and Hindi.
 

For Chemistry & Pol. Science:

Two years’ Integrated Post Graduate M.Sc Course of Regional College of Education of NCERT in the concerned subject; OR Master Degree from a recognized University with at least 50% marks in aggregate in the following subject as per the Post:
PGT (Chemistry) Chemistry/ Bio. Chem.
PGT (Political Science) – Master’s Degree in Political Science
B.Ed. or equivalent degree from recognized university.
Proficiency in teaching through Hindi and English medium.
Desirable : Working knowledge of computer applications.
 

2. PRT

Educational Qualification: 

Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and 2 year diploma in elementary education (by whatever name known). OR Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and 4 year Bachelor of Elementary Education (B.El.Ed) OR Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and 2 year Diploma in Education (Special Education).
Qualified in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test(CTET1) conducted by the Govt. of India.
Proficiency in teaching Hindi and English medium.
Desirable: Working knowledge of computer applications.

 

3. TGT Special Educator

Educational Qualification: 

Any Graduate with 50% marks with B.Ed. in Special education. OR
B.Ed. (General) with one year diploma in special education. OR
B.Ed. (General) with two-year diploma in special education. OR
B.Ed. (General) with Post Graduate Professional Diploma in Special Education (PGPD). OR
B.Ed. Special Education and Post Graduate Professional Certificate in Special Education (PGPC). OR
PG Diploma in Special Education (Mental Retardation) OR
PG Diploma in Special Education (Multiple Disabilities: Physical And Neurological). OR
PG Diploma in Special Education (Locomotor Impairment And Cerebral Palsy). OR
Secondary Level Teacher Training Course In Visual Impairment. OR
Senior Diploma in Teaching the Deaf. OR
BA/ B.Ed. in Visual Impairment. OR
Any other equivalent qualification approved by RCI
Qualified in CTET(Elementary Stage) conducted by CBSE
Registration with rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) with valid CRR number.
Desirable: Knowledge of Computer application and Working knowledge of English and Hindi.

 

4. Sports Coaches (Preferably expertise in Kabaddi & Basketball)


Educational Qualification: Graduation in any discipline with Diploma in the specific field in basketball or Kabaddi (at least of one-year duration)/ B. P.Ed./D.P.Ed. / M.P.Ed. / Certificate course in Sports coaching OR Graduation/ Senior Secondary / Certificate course in Sports coaching in any discipline with National Certificate holder in the concerned field of sports.

 

5. Yoga Instructor

Educational Qualification: Graduate in any subject or equivalent from a recognized University and at least one year Degree/ Diploma in Yoga from a recognized Institute.

 

6. Computer Instructor Secondary & Primary

Educational Qualification: B.Ed. B.Tech (Computer Science)/ BCA/ MCA/ M.Sc (Computer Science) M.Sc. (Electronics with Computer Science Component)/ M.Sc. (IT)/ B.Sc. (Computer Science) Or Bachelor’s/ Master’s degree in any Science subject/ Mathematics from recognized University with Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Application from Govt recognized university/ institute. OR Post Graduate Degree in any subject with Post Graduate Diploma in Computer Application from Govt. recognized University/ ‘O’ Level from DOEACC OR Post Graduate Degree in any subject with Minimum ‘A’ Level from DOEACC.

 

7. Nurse

Educational Qualification: B.Sc. Nursing /Diploma in nursing from recognized Institute.

 

8. Counsellor

Educational Qualification: B.A/B.Sc.(Psychology) with one year Post Graduate Diploma in Guidance & Counselling.

Desirable: Minimum of One Year experience in Providing Career/Education Counselling to students at schools. OR Working knowledge and experience in Placement Bureaus. OR Registration with Rehabilitation Council of India as Vocational Counsellor.

 

9. Assamese Teacher

Educational Qualification: Assamese as a Major subject in Graduation or Graduation who have studied Assamese in all the three years of Graduation. B.Ed. or equivalent degree from recognized university will be preferred if suitable otherwise.

Desirable: Working knowledge of Computer Application.

 

10. Art & Craft Coach

Educational Qualification: Degree/Diploma in Fine Art & Craft from recognized university/Institution.

11. Vocational Education Trainer

Educational Qualification: BE, B.Tech, Electronic & communication Engineering

Experience: Minimum One Year Experience in the relevant field.


Age Limit(For All Posts): Maximum age of the candidate for all the posts would be 65 Years.

How to Apply for KV Borjhar Recruitment
Interested and eligible candidates must appear for the Walk-in Interview as per the schedule mentioned below. All applicants are required to complete document verification with original certificates before appearing for the interview. Candidates should bring the duly filled Registration-cum-Application Form with a recent photograph affixed, along with one set of self-attested photocopies of all certificates and mark sheets (year-wise) and the original documents for verification. Since the interview process may continue throughout the day and extend into the evening, candidates are advised to come prepared accordingly.

Document Verification: 08:30 AM onwards

Reporting Time: 08:00 AM on 27 June 2026 (Late entry will not be allowed after 11:59 AM)

Venue: PM SHRI Kendriya Vidyalaya AFS Borjhar, Mountain Shadow, Azara, Guwahati – 781017
